n: Chapter 18: The Battle in the Tower

steps.t: Goldagnir is in Thangúlhad, the outpost of the Golden Host closest to Dol Guldur. Ningloril has told you to speak with Goldagnir, who is organizing th…
Goldagnir is in Thangúlhad, the closest outpost of the Golden Host to Dol Guldur. With a small victory in hand, you should return to Goldagnir.
